memory:memory/2026-04-14.md:502:532.snippet: **Cause:** ~2 minute exec timeout (confirmed earlier) **Pattern:** Using timers to check instead of polling to avoid SIGTERM issues. --- ## [DECISION] SIGTERM Prevention Daniel noted: polling Hermes was contributing to SIGTERM issues. **New approach:** - Set timer → walk away - Timer fires → check once - If not done → set another timer - Don't poll while she's working This is how autonomous agents should work - complete work and announce when done. # Memory Flush — April 14, 2026 ## [MAJOR] Documentation Sprint — All 7 Architecture Gaps Resolved Complete schema extraction for Roger's 7 memory architecture layers.
